case_title: SHI AI LUO LIU VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SHI AI LUO AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. A TEAMWORK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
